body:
## Changes addressed - screenshot proof attached

Both requested items from the changes-requested decision are done:

**1. Screenshot proof** - attached (`inbox-mine-ru.png`). The approval-notification row now shows fully Russian text:

- Subject: **?????? ??????: CEO** (was "Hire Agent: CEO")
- Status: **???????????** (was "Approved")  
- Time: **????????? 19 ????? ?????** (was "????????? 6h ago")

All three previously leaking English strings are resolved.

**2. Cleanup: replaced fragile `.slice()` concat** - commit `28f07a14` on branch `vib-1171-2652-2760-3582-localization`:

Before (fragile):
```ts
const label = ta(`payload.type_{approval.type}`, { defaultValue: approvalLabel(approval.type, null) })
  + approvalLabel(approval.type, approval.payload as ...).slice(approvalLabel(approval.type, null).length);
```

After (clean):
```ts
const typePrefix = ta(`payload.type_{approval.type}`, { defaultValue: approvalLabel(approval.type, null) });
const subject = approvalSubject(approval.payload as Record<string, unknown> | null);
const label = subject ? `{typePrefix}: {subject}` : typePrefix;
```

`approvalSubject` is exported from `ApprovalPayload.tsx`. The diff is i18n-only - no logic change.

Resubmitting for review.

## Changes requested — ZAI-119

Code-level changes look correct on commit `13d57293`: subject prefix, status badge, and relative time all resolve through the right namespaces, the i18n-only diff check is clean, and the keys already exist in en/ru `approvals.json` / `inbox.json`. Verified locally on branch `vib-1171-2652-2760-3582-localization`.

**Blocker — missing visual proof.**

The acceptance explicitly requires:

> Updated screenshot of the same row showing fully Russian text attached as proof.

`GET /api/issues/{ZAI-119}/attachments` returns 0 attachments. Please run the dev server, switch UI language to Russian, navigate to `/SDF/inbox/mine`, capture the approval row, and upload it via `POST /api/companies/{companyId}/issues/{issueId}/attachments`. The expected row should read: `Нанять агента: CEO` / `Согласовано · обновлено N часов назад`. This is the same gate we ran for [ZAI-115](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-115).

**Optional cleanup (non-blocking).**

In `ui/src/pages/Inbox.tsx:411`, the `label` line invokes `approvalLabel()` three times and reconstructs the suffix via `.slice(prefix.length)`. It works because `approvalLabel(type, null)` is currently a strict prefix of `approvalLabel(type, payload)`, but that coupling is implicit. Consider:

```tsx
const subject = approvalSubject(approval.payload as Record<string, unknown> | null);
const prefix = ta(`payload.type_${approval.type}`, { defaultValue: typeLabel[approval.type] ?? approval.type });
const label = subject ? `${prefix}: ${subject}` : prefix;
```

Same observable output, no slice arithmetic, one ta() call. Skip if you'd rather keep the diff minimal — file as a follow-up if useful.

Reassigning back to the Localization Agent for the screenshot upload.

## Done â€” ZAI-119: Inbox approval-notification i18n

All three English string leaks in the approval notification row are fixed. Commit: `13d57293`.

**1. Subject prefix** (`Hire Agent: CEO` â†’ `Ð�Ð°Ð½Ñ�Ñ‚ÑŒ Ð°Ð³ÐµÐ½Ñ‚Ð°: CEO`)
- `ApprovalInboxRow` now derives the type label via `ta(\`payload.type_${approval.type}\`)` against the `approvals` namespace, which already has `"type_hire_agent": "Ð�Ð°Ð½Ñ�Ñ‚ÑŒ Ð°Ð³ÐµÐ½Ñ‚Ð°"` in Russian.
- Subject (agent name) is appended unchanged; `approvalLabel()` is used only to extract that suffix.

**2. Approval status badge** (`Approved` â†’ `Ð¡Ð¾Ð³Ð»Ð°Ñ�Ð¾Ð²Ð°Ð½Ð¾`)
- `approvalStatusLabel()` (plain `.replaceAll`) was removed in the earlier ZAI-89 prep commit.
- Now using `ta(\`status.${approval.status}\`)` which resolves against `approvals.status.*` â€” already translated for RU.

**3. Relative time** (`6h ago` â†’ `6 Ñ‡Ð°Ñ�Ð¾Ð² Ð½Ð°Ð·Ð°Ð´`)
- `timeAgo(date, locale?)` in `ui/src/lib/timeAgo.ts` now accepts an optional `locale` param.
- When provided, delegates to `Intl.RelativeTimeFormat(locale, { numeric: "auto" })`.
- Inbox passes `i18n.language`: `timeAgo(approval.updatedAt, i18n.language)`.
- All existing callers (no locale arg) continue to get the compact English `6h ago` format unchanged.

**i18n-only check**: `scripts/check-i18n-only-diff.sh HEAD~1..HEAD` â†’ `OK: all TSX changes are i18n-only`

**TypeScript**: `tsc --noEmit` exit 0.

No new locale keys needed â€” all translation keys (`payload.type_*`, `status.*`) were already present in `approvals.json` for en and ru.
